overall.description: A cinematic nighttime scene from a cyberpunk video game showing a rain-soaked urban intersection viewed from an elevated walkway. Neon billboards and holographic advertisements illuminate the hazy atmosphere as the camera slowly advances above a circular plaza structure surrounded by futuristic high-rise buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway overlooking neon-lit intersection with circular plaza

agents.ego_description: slowly walking along an elevated exterior walkway while overlooking the rain-soaked city street and plaza below

entered.detail: circular street-level structure with glowing red neon trim surrounding a central monument or fountain
multi-story building facade illuminated with vertical red neon light strips
tall residential tower with dark balconies and lit windows rising alongside the viewpoint
large illuminated advertising billboard with bright white and orange light visible through the rain haze
concrete balcony or bridge surface with metal railings that the camera is moving along
small aerial vehicle or drone hovering in the distance above the plaza

segments.scene_description: From an elevated walkway, the camera slowly advances through heavy rain overlooking a cyberpunk city intersection. Below, a circular plaza structure glows with red neon trim while towering buildings flank both sides. A massive illuminated billboard dominates the distant skyline through the hazy atmosphere, and sparse traffic moves along the wet streets beneath.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an elevated vantage point that pushes deeper into a rain-soaked cyberpunk cityscape. It begins on a high walkway, advancing slowly through heavy rain while overlooking a glowing urban intersection. As the camera moves forward, the view expands to reveal a circular plaza structure below, defined by its sharp red neon trim and flanked by towering skyscrapers. The scene then shifts focus toward the distant skyline, where a massive illuminated billboard pierces through the hazy atmosphere above the wet streets and sparse traffic.
